headlines.title: READY TO COLLECT COIN FOR POLL TAX: EVERYBODY HUSTLE
headlines.subtitle: County Officials Have Office Forces Working to Get Receipts and Rolls in Shape by Wednesday. URGE CITIZENS TO PAY EARLY AND AVOID RUSH No Desire to Repeat the Mad Scramble of the Closing Days of January-Some Persons Are Exempt.

headlines.title: COTTON FUTURES TAX CENSURED BY DEALER
headlines.subtitle: Clark's Tariff Provision Would Be Positive Detriment to the Industry, M. L. Dickerson Asserts.

headlines.subtitle: Delegation Will Spend Next Thursday at Weatherford. Special Cars Chartered and All Will Be Welcomed.

We have worked on it, too, and are glad to state that we have solved the problem. In sending orders give number of rings wanted, bore of cylinder, width of groove, depth of groove, make and model of car. BRYANT MACHINERY COMPANY 8th and Commerce Streets Fort Worth, Texas.
